title: Quiz: Controlled Unitaries in QPE
description: Test your understanding of controlled unitary operations

questions.question: In QPE, qubit k (0-indexed) controls which power of U?
questions.explanation: Qubit k controls U^(2^k). This exponential scaling is key to QPE's efficiency.

questions.question: To compute U^32, how many matrix multiplications are needed using repeated squaring?
A controlled-U gate acting on a 2-qubit U has dimension:
questions.explanation: 1 control + 2 target qubits = 3 qubits total, so 2³ × 2³ = 8×8.

questions.question: Phase kickback occurs because U|ψ⟩ = e^(iφ)|ψ⟩ transfers the phase to the control qubit.
questions.explanation: When the target is an eigenstate, the eigenvalue phase kicks back to the control.
